mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRAINING_BOOK (HOMEPAGE_ID, GROUP_IDX, CATEGORY_IDX, TRAINING_IDX, STUDENT_IDX, TRAINING_DATE, STATUS, ADD_ID, DELETE_YN) VALUES (#{homepage_id}, #{group_idx}, #{category_idx}, #{training_idx}, #{student_idx}, #{training_date}, #{status}, #{add_id}, 'N')
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TRAINING_BOOK USING DUAL ON ( HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND GROUP_IDX = #{group_idx} AND CATEGORY_IDX = #{category_idx} AND TRAINING_IDX = #{training_idx} AND STUDENT_IDX = #{student_idx} AND TRAINING_DATE = #{training_date}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET STATUS = #{status} , MOD_DATE = SYSDATE , MOD_ID = #{mod_id} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (HOMEPAGE_ID, GROUP_IDX, CATEGORY_IDX, TRAINING_IDX, STUDENT_IDX, TRAINING_DATE, STATUS, ADD_ID, DELETE_YN) VALUES (#{homepage_id}, #{group_idx}, #{category_idx}, #{training_idx}, #{student_idx}, #{training_date}, #{status}, #{add_id}, 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT TRAINING_BOOK_TIME_IDX, HOMEPAGE_ID, GROUP_IDX, CATEGORY_IDX, TRAINING_IDX, TRAINING_DATE FROM TRAINING_BOOK_TIME WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND GROUP_IDX = #{group_idx} AND CATEGORY_IDX = #{category_idx} AND TRAINING_IDX = #{training_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY TRAINING_DATE ASC

SELECT a.STUDENT_IDX, a.STUDENT_NAME, b.TRAINING_BOOK_TIME_IDX, b.TRAINING_DATE, (SELECT STATUS FROM TRAINING_BOOK_DETAIL WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = b.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = b.CATEGORY_IDX AND TRAINING_IDX = b.TRAINING_IDX AND STUDENT_IDX = a.STUDENT_IDX AND TRAINING_BOOK_TIME_IDX = b.TRAINING_BOOK_TIME_IDX ) as STATUS, (SELECT PAY1 FROM TRAINING_BOOK_DETAIL WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = b.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = b.CATEGORY_IDX AND TRAINING_IDX = b.TRAINING_IDX AND STUDENT_IDX = a.STUDENT_IDX AND TRAINING_BOOK_TIME_IDX = b.TRAINING_BOOK_TIME_IDX ) as PAY1, (SELECT PAY2 FROM TRAINING_BOOK_DETAIL WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = b.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = b.CATEGORY_IDX AND TRAINING_IDX = b.TRAINING_IDX AND STUDENT_IDX = a.STUDENT_IDX AND TRAINING_BOOK_TIME_IDX = b.TRAINING_BOOK_TIME_IDX ) as PAY2, (SELECT PAY3 FROM TRAINING_BOOK_DETAIL WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = b.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = b.CATEGORY_IDX AND TRAINING_IDX = b.TRAINING_IDX AND STUDENT_IDX = a.STUDENT_IDX AND TRAINING_BOOK_TIME_IDX = b.TRAINING_BOOK_TIME_IDX ) as PAY3 FROM TRAINING_STUDENT a, TRAINING_BOOK_TIME b WHERE a.HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID(+) AND a.GROUP_IDX = b.GROUP_IDX(+) AND a.CATEGORY_IDX = b.CATEGORY_IDX(+) AND a.TRAINING_IDX = b.TRAINING_IDX(+) AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND a.GROUP_IDX = #{group_idx} AND a.CATEGORY_IDX = #{category_idx} AND a.TRAINING_IDX = #{training_idx} AND b.TRAINING_DATE = #{training_date} AND a.APPLY_STATUS = 1 AND a.DELETE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY STUDENT_NAME ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE TRAINING_BOOK_TIME SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE TRAINING_BOOK_TIME_IDX = #{training_book_time_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT a.STUDENT_NAME, a.STUDENT_ADDRESS, a.STUDENT_IDX, b.TRAINING_DATE, b.TRAINING_BOOK_TIME_IDX, c.STATUS, c.PAY1, c.PAY2, c.PAY3 FROM TRAINING_STUDENT a, TRAINING_BOOK_TIME b, TRAINING_BOOK_DETAIL c WHERE a.HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID AND a.GROUP_IDX = b.GROUP_IDX AND a.CATEGORY_IDX = b.CATEGORY_IDX AND a.TRAINING_IDX = b.TRAINING_IDX AND a.STUDENT_IDX = c.STUDENT_IDX AND b.HOMEPAGE_ID = c.HOMEPAGE_ID AND b.GROUP_IDX = c.GROUP_IDX AND b.CATEGORY_IDX = c.CATEGORY_IDX AND b.TRAINING_IDX = c.TRAINING_IDX AND a.STUDENT_IDX = c.STUDENT_IDX AND b.TRAINING_BOOK_TIME_IDX = c.TRAINING_BOOK_TIME_IDX AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND a.GROUP_IDX = #{group_idx} AND a.CATEGORY_IDX = #{category_idx} AND a.TRAINING_IDX = #{training_idx} AND a.APPLY_STATUS = 1 AND a.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND b.DELETE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY TRAINING_BOOK_TIME_IDX ASC
